text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahahahahahaha! No way! You're messing with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Nishino Flower looking like she wants to
speak to Tosen Jordan. Unfortunately, the latter
is deep in conversation with a friend.

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Am not! Get this, Nakayama and Prez threw
cheesy puns at each other for ten whole minutes!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For real?! Wish I could've been there! Wait—tell
me you recorded it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm? ...Aww, sorry, I gotta dash.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, was Flower here just now?
choice_data_list: Yeah. It looked like she was waiting for you.
Yeah. It looked like she was waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, sounds like I screwed up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I notice a key chain lying at my feet.
There's a small plushie hanging from it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's gotta be Flower's.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Dunno where I'd find her, so I guess I'll
give it to Bourbon. They're roomies and all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Bourbon. We picked up something of
Flower's. Mind passing it along?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Acknowledged. I shall retain it for safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I didn't take you for a fan of those sorts
of mags.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is only for investigative purposes. I purchased
several after seeing Flower brooding over them
each night.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah? Something's got her bothered?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Which ones was she reading?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My own interest piqued, I flip through a few
magazines. Which of these articles has Nishino
Flower most likely read?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
DIY... Commencing relevant keyword search.
Article match found: "How to Build a Resin
Table!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? Since when is she building a table?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing her recent behavior, we may
extrapolate that she wants a table to place by the
flower bed. She must be deliberating over its
construction.
choice_data_list: Maybe she dropped by to ask you for advice.
Maybe she dropped by to ask you for advice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah... doubt that. Does my look scream "DIY"
to you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But Flower was muttering about lacquer, polish,
and UV light while reading. This is the only DIY
article that matches all terms.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's likely that she was studying the process of
coloring the wood with lacquer before hardening
it with UV light and applying polish.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... You sure she wasn't reading about nails?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Nails." Cross-checking database for related
keywords...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop, stop! You don't gotta bother—it's
obviously nail-related! I mean, tables? Like,
what?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Totally! I bet she wanted to ask me about her
wardrobe earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Inconsistency discovered. I heard Flower mutter
several terms while reading magazines, but none
are in this article.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Expanding the definitions leads to a weak match
with a shoe care article, but that seems unlikely.
Are you certain she is concerned about her attire?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What kinda stuff was she saying?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have records of her saying the words "lacquer,"
"polish," and "UV light."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's gotta be about nails.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Nails." Cross-checking database for related
keywords...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop, stop! You don't gotta bother—it's
obviously nail-related! Like, when did shoes even
come into this?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So the terms "lacquer," "polish," and "UV light"
also fall under the category of nails? It seems I
must update my database.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing the sweets competition got her
interested. Think she wanted my help or
something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meh, whatevs. Bourbon, gimme your hand. I'll do
your nails.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: For what reason is that necessary?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, y'know, since Flower seems interested.
Don'tcha think it'd be a good convo starter?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're her roomie and all, so it'd be easy for her
to bring it up with you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reasoning acknowledged. I will gladly comply
with your order.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm short on time, so I'll only paint your index
finger. But I'll make it crazy cute!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Kay, we're done! It's all you now, Bourbon! Kill it!
